hook: Online therapy can cost a few hundred a month. People say it's pricey. They're not wrong.
vo: Subscriptions on the big platforms commonly run around two hundred and eighty to four hundred dollars a month.
A lot of that doesn't reach the therapist.
Faresay is free to start. No commission on sessions. The therapist sets their own price and keeps it.
Fair for the therapist usually means fair for the client too.
cta: Fair for the therapist usually means fair for the client too.
broll_notes: Close-up of a phone screen showing a clean, minimal booking or payment interface. Cut to a hand setting a price field. Soft natural light, no faces, no branding of other platforms.
